heading: Supported Clients
body:
You can create and manage MongoDB Vector Search indexes through the Atlas UI,
[mongosh](mongodb-shell), Atlas CLI, Atlas Administration API, and the following
[MongoDB Drivers](drivers):

| MongoDB Driver | Version          |
| -------------- | ---------------- |
| C              | 1.28.0 or higher |
| C++            | 3.11.0 or higher |
| C#             | 3.1.0 or higher  |
| Go             | 1.16.0 or higher |
| Java           | 5.2.0 or higher  |
| Kotlin         | 5.2.0 or higher  |
| Node           | 6.6.0 or higher  |
| PHP            | 1.20.0 or higher |
| Python         | 4.7 or higher    |
| Rust           | 3.1.0 or higher  |
| Scala          | 5.2.0 or higher  |

You can create and manage MongoDB Vector Search indexes through the [mongosh](mongodb-shell),
MongoDB Compass, and the following [MongoDB Drivers](drivers):

| MongoDB Driver | Version          |
| -------------- | ---------------- |
| C              | 1.28.0 or higher |
| C++            | 3.11.0 or higher |
| C#             | 3.1.0 or higher  |
| Go             | 1.16.0 or higher |
| Java           | 5.2.0 or higher  |
| Kotlin         | 5.2.0 or higher  |
| Node           | 6.6.0 or higher  |
| PHP            | 1.20.0 or higher |
| Python         | 4.7 or higher    |
| Rust           | 3.1.0 or higher  |
| Scala          | 5.2.0 or higher  |
